'''zazhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearer|fearer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearer|fearer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zazhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzhihith|zæzhihith]] || [[word:zæzhihij|zæzhihij]] || [[word:zæzhihish|zæzhihish]] || [[word:zæzhihi|zæzhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhuzhuhuth|zazhuzhuhuth]] || [[word:zazhuzhuhuj|zazhuzhuhuj]] || [[word:zazhuzhuhush|zazhuzhuhush]] || [[word:zazhuzhuhu|zazhuzhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhuhuth|zazhuhuth]] || [[word:zazhuhuj|zazhuhuj]] || [[word:zazhuhush|zazhuhush]] || [[word:zazhuhu|zazhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhufhuth|zazhufhuth]] || [[word:zazhufhuj|zazhufhuj]] || [[word:zazhufhush|zazhufhush]] || [[word:zazhufhuf|zazhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazhuhuthu|zazhuhuthu]] || [[word:zazhuhuju|zazhuhuju]] || [[word:zazhuhushu|zazhuhushu]] || [[word:zazhuhuku|zazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazhuhuth|zazhuhuth]] || [[word:zazhuhuj|zazhuhuj]] || [[word:zazhuhush|zazhuhush]] || [[word:zazhuhu|zazhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazhuhuthul|zazhuhuthul]] || [[word:zazhuhujul|zazhuhujul]] || [[word:zazhuhushul|zazhuhushul]] || [[word:zazhuhukul|zazhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazhuhuthuthu|zazhuhuthuthu]] || [[word:zazhuhujuju|zazhuhujuju]] || [[word:zazhuhushushu|zazhuhushushu]] || [[word:zazhuhuku|zazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazhuhuthun|zazhuhuthun]] || [[word:zazhuhujun|zazhuhujun]] || [[word:zazhuhushun|zazhuhushun]] || [[word:zazhuhukun|zazhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazhuhuthuoro|zazhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:zazhuhujuoro|zazhuhujuoro]] || [[word:zazhuhushuoro|zazhuhushuoro]] || [[word:zazhuhukuoro|zazhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
